data.title: Integrative Ear, Nose & Throat Expands to Lindenhurst, Bringing Advanced, Minimally Invasive ENT Care to South Shore Long Island
data.description: Dr. Michael S. Cohen's practice, Integrative Ear Nose & Throat, is set to inaugurate its third location in Lindenhurst, NY, at 100 E. Sunrise Highway on Long Island. This expansion is a strategic move to provide specialized holistic ENT care to a broader population across Nassau and Suffolk County.

data.title: Philatron Wire & Cable Advancing Next-Generation Charging Infrastructure for Fleet and Public EV Networks at ACT Expo May 4-7, 2026
data.description: In Las Vegas on March 30, 2026, a renowned U.S. manufacturer called Philatron Wire and Cable is set to present cutting-edge electric vehicle (EV) charging cable innovations at the Advanced Clean Transportation (ACT) Expo 2026. This event will provide a platform for industry advancements and product displays, highlighting the company's state-of-the-art solutions to address the evolving demands of the EV market.

data.title: Why Is United Therapeutics Stock Soaring Monday?
data.description: United Therapeutics Corporation's (NASDAQ: UTHR) shares saw an increase in the premarket session after it was announced that the TETON-1 Phase 3 pivotal study for nebulized Tyvaso (treprostinil) achieved its primary goal. The study revealed that nebulized Tyvaso led to a significant improvement in forced vital capacity (FVC) by 130.1 mL compared to a placebo. Additionally, the drug was found to lower the risk of clinical deterioration in patients suffering from idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), a chronic lung condition characterized by irreversible scarring of lung tissue causing breathing complications. Further analyses of the TETON-1 and TETON-2 studies displayed notable treatment effects in various secondary efficacy endpoints. Data on overall survival at week 52 also indicated a positive trend.

data.title: Building Financial Confidence Early: Regions Bank Highlights New and Enhanced Resources During Financial Literacy Month
data.description: Regions Bank in Birmingham, Alabama, revealed a set of free resources on Monday to assist college students, young adults, and individuals in establishing a solid base for financial security. In recognition of Financial Literacy Month in April, Regions Bank emphasizes the significance of fostering financial assurance at a young age. The bank offers financial literacy programs through Regions Next Step®, benefiting schools, corporations, and nonprofits, accessible to all throughout the year.

data.title: Pine Creek Rail Trail Named Pennsylvania’s 2026 Trail of the Year
data.description: In Wellsboro, Pennsylvania, the Pine Creek Rail Trail has been selected as the Trail of the Year for 2026 by the Pennsylvania Department of Conservation and Natural Resources. This recognition is a major achievement for outdoor recreation and tourism in Potter and Tioga Counties. The program aims to showcase trails offering exceptional recreation options, environmental conservation efforts, and ties to nearby communities. Serving as a key element in the outdoor adventure landscape, the trail stands out as a prime destination.

data.title: TJGC Group Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Letter Regarding Minimum Bid Price Deficiency
data.description: In Hong Kong on March 30, 2026, TJGC Group Limited (Nasdaq: TJGC), a marketing and advertising services provider, disclosed receipt of a noncompliance letter from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. Issued on March 26, 2026, the letter reported that based on TJGC's closing bid price over the past 30 consecutive business days, the company fell short of Nasdaq's continued listing standard outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rules 5550(a)(2), mandating a minimum bid price of $1 per share.

data.title: Relay Resources Adds Port of Portland HR Director to Board of Directors
data.description: Portland-based nonprofit Relay Resources, known for promoting disability inclusion in the workplace, has appointed Heather Chao, the HR director of Port of Portland, to its Board of Directors. With almost 30 years in HR leadership roles in diverse public and private sectors, Chao brings valuable expertise to the organization. Her appointment signifies Relay Resources' commitment to enhancing its board with experienced professionals.

FX since the war: oil up, dollar up, oil down, dollar down. Trump's first energy threat made BBC headlines and moved markets hard. The 10-day extension did nothing. Same threat, fraction of the reaction. The market has moved on.

data.title: The Hackett Group® Identifies Top Collections, Dispute, Deduction Management Software Vendors
data.description: In Miami, The Hackett Group, Inc., a prominent Gen AI consultancy and digital transformation firm listed on NASDAQ as HCKT, recently published its newest Digital World Class® Matrix. This matrix concentrates on the collections, dispute, and deduction management software sector. The report assesses the capabilities of top software vendors, emphasizing the significant link between AI-driven touchless collection processes, faster dispute resolution cycles, and enhanced cash flow. The findings highlight the importance of AI in optimizing collection activities and improving financial outcomes.
